title: Simple Ring Spinner
description: Create a rotating ring spinner with CSS only.
hint: Use a div with border, border-top-color, border-radius, and rotate animation.
solution: .spinner { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 4px solid #eee; border-top-color: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

title: Pulsing Circle
description: Create a pulsing circle loading indicator.
solution: .pulse { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 1s ease infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.5; } 50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 1; } }

title: Skeleton Card
description: Create a skeleton loading card with avatar, lines, and shimmer effect.
hint: Use linear-gradient background and animate background-position.
startingCode: .skeleton-card { padding: 24px; background: #1a1a2e; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; gap: 16px; }
solution: .skeleton-card { padding: 24px; background: #1a1a2e; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; gap: 16px; } .sk-avatar { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2a2a4a; } .sk-line { height: 12px; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#2a2a4a 25%,#3a3a5a 50%,#2a2a4a 75%); background-size: 200%; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite; } .sk-line:last-child { width: 60%; } @keyframes shimmer { 0% { background-position: -200% 0; } 100% { background-position: 200% 0; } }

title: Custom Animated Logo Loader
description: Design a unique loading animation that represents a brand logo using CSS animations.
hint: Combine multiple animations on different parts of the logo.
solution: .logo-loader { position: relative; width: 100px; height: 100px; } .logo-part { position: absolute; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; } .part-1 { background: #3b82f6; animation: bounce 0.6s ease infinite alternate; } .part-2 { background: #8b5cf6; left: 30px; animation: bounce 0.6s ease 0.2s infinite alternate; } .part-3 { background: #10b981; left: 60px; animation: bounce 0.6s ease 0.4s infinite alternate; } @keyframes bounce { from { transform: translateY(0); } to { transform: translateY(-30px); } }
